question: How many pork sausage patties are arranged on the white plate in the opening shot?

Which text instruction regarding the cooking duration appears in the overlay? A. cook 10 minutes & cool completely B. heat 2 tbsp vegetable oil over medium-low C. 2 cups chopped onion D. Pork Sausage Patties
What color is the chef's coat worn by the person preparing the food? A. Black B. Blue C. White D. Grey
Describe what is happening during the cooking process.
canonical_answer: A chef wearing a black and white striped apron stands behind a granite countertop. A hand with a dark wrist tattoo pours chopped white onions into a silver metal frying pan. The pan sits positioned over a blue gas flame. The onions are stirred continuously using a white silicone spatula. Text overlays instruct to heat vegetable oil and cook the mixture for ten minutes.

question: Which of the previously seen people is back on screen? A. person with light skin tone hand pouring liquid B. person with small dark tattoo on wrist pouring onions C. person with dark ink tattoo stirring onions D. man with short dark hair and white chef's coat holding container

What action is the person performing with the ingredients in the metal bowl? A. frying B. plating C. mixing D. garnishing
Describe the specific cooking actions and instructions shown during the initial preparation phase, noting when each occurs.
canonical_answer: At 10s, oil is poured into a silver pan over a blue flame; at 12s, chopped onions are added from a container into the pan; at 14s, a hand stirs the onions with a white spatula; at 18s, on-screen text instructs to cook for 10 minutes.

What will the chef do with the meat mixture after combining all the ingredients?
canonical_answer: The chef rolls the brownish food mixture into ball shapes using both hands.
